predicate.title: Leftover sweep: change scaffolder, generated READMEs, Actions bump
predicate.problem: Five leftover nodes were registered awaiting a dedicated sweep: no clock-timestamped change scaffolder existed, spec/README.md and bindings/github/README.md were still hand-maintained prose, and several GitHub Actions were pinned to deprecated-Node20 majors.
acceptance_criteria: spec/tools/new-change.py scaffolds change.json + evidence/intent.json + evidence/classification.json with real produced_at values and mints the per-date sequence
spec/README.md and bindings/github/README.md are generated from knowledge nodes + doc manifests with no content drift
This repo's workflows use current-major actions/checkout and actions/setup-python
out_of_scope: asdlc-verify repo changes (fixtures pin, go.sum, Actions bump) — outside this repo's working directory
